zh.lifeSummary: 當Adele d'Ailly於0997年出生在法國皮卡迪索姆艾利勒-豪吉可洛黑時，她的父親Huon d'Ailly seigneur d’Ailly-Le-Haut-Clocher29歲，母親Giselberthe d'Aumâle28歲。她於1014年與Guermond de Picquigny I在法國皮卡迪索姆皮易尼結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1056年在法國洛萊姆斯布拉班吉萊-洛易享年59歲。

nameMeanings.name: d'Ailly
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and Irish: mainly Scottish variant of Irish   Daly  .
Scottish (of Norman origin): variant of   Dally   2, a cognate of 3 below.

variants.name: Daly
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Kieran, Dermot, Brigid, Aileen, Declan, Finbarr, Fintan, Aidan, Brennan, Bridie, Cathal.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Dálaigh ‘descendant of Dálach’, a personal name based on dál (modern dáil) ‘meeting, assembly’.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Dally   2.

variants.name: Alyea
meanings: Americanized form of French D'Ailly or Dailly . Compare Allee 2 and Elyea .

History: This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (along with several variants, including Allée, and the original form d'Ailly). The Huguenot ancestor was Nicolas d'Ailly, who came from France to NY c. 1682 via the Netherlands and England and died in NJ c. 1700.

nameMeanings.name: Adele
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From French Adèle , an ancient name popular in medieval Europe because of the fame of a 7th-century saint, a daughter of the Frankish king Dagobert II. It is of Germanic origin, from adal ‘noble’ (a short form of a two-element name such as Adelheid; see Adelaide ). It was the name of William the Conqueror's youngest daughter ( c.1062–1137 ), who became the wife of Stephen of Blois. However, it died out in England in the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, being the name of a character in Johann Strauss's opera Die Fledermaus. Its popularity was further reinforced in the 1930s as the name of a character in the novels of Dornford Yates .

en.lifeSummary: When Adele d'Ailly was born in 0997, in Ailly-le-Haut-Clocher, Somme, Picardie, France, her father, Huon d'Ailly seigneur d’Ailly-Le-Haut-Clocher, was 29 and her mother, Giselberthe d'Aumâle, was 28. She married Guermond de Picquigny I in 1014, in Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in 1056, in Brabant-le-Roi, Meuse, Lorraine, France, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adele d'Ailly est née en 0997, à Ailly-le-Haut-Clocher, Somme, Picardie, France, son père, Huon d'Ailly seigneur d’Ailly-Le-Haut-Clocher, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Giselberthe d'Aumâle, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Guermond de Picquigny I en 1014, à Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en 1056, à Brabant-le-Roi, Meuse, Lorraine, France, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adele d'Ailly 0997 in Ailly-le-Haut-Clocher, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Huon d'Ailly seigneur d’Ailly-Le-Haut-Clocher 29 und ihre Mutter Giselberthe d'Aumâle 28. Sie hat 1014 in Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich Guermond de Picquigny I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb 1056 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Brabant-le-Roi, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adele d'Ailly è nata il nel 0997 nel Ailly-le-Haut-Clocher, Somme, Picardie, Francia, sua padre, Huon d'Ailly seigneur d’Ailly-Le-Haut-Clocher, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Giselberthe d'Aumâle, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Guermond de Picquigny I nel 1014, nel Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1056, nel Brabant-le-Roi, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, all'età di 59 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Adele d'Ailly(이)가 0997년 프랑스 피카디 솜 아이리-레-하트-c럭어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Huon d'Ailly seigneur d’Ailly-Le-Haut-Clocher(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Giselberthe d'Aumâle(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1014년 프랑스 피카디 솜 피c키그니에서 Guermond de Picquigny I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1056년 프랑스 로레이인 우스 브라반트-레-로이에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adele d'Ailly nasceu em 0997, em Ailly-le-Haut-Clocher, Somme, Picardie, França, seu pai, Huon d'Ailly seigneur d’Ailly-Le-Haut-Clocher, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Giselberthe d'Aumâle, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Guermond de Picquigny I em 1014, em Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1056, em Brabant-le-Roi, Meuse, Lorraine, França, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adele d'Ailly родилась в 0997 г. в местности эилли-ле-хаут-клочир, сомм, пикарди, Франция, её отцу по имени Huon d'Ailly seigneur d’Ailly-Le-Haut-Clocher было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Giselberthe d'Aumâle, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guermond de Picquigny I в 1014 г. в местности пиккуигни, сомм, пикарди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в 1056 г. в местности брабант-ле-рои, меус, лорреаин, Франция в возрасте 59 лет.

Se casó con Guermond de Picquigny I en 1014, en Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos.
